action_logs.rule_description: Escalates to requester clarification due to missing required information.
Escalate to Procurement Manager when preferred supplier is restricted.
Escalates to Head of Strategic Sourcing when value exceeds threshold.
Escalates to Head of Category when no compliant supplier is found.
Escalates to Security and Compliance Review due to data residency constraint conflict.
Escalates to Sourcing Excellence Lead due to single-supplier capacity risk.
Escalates to Marketing Governance Lead when a brand safety review is needed.
Escalate to Regional Compliance Lead if supplier is not registered or sanctioned-screened in the delivery country and the currency is USD
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN currency = "USD"

action_logs.rule_description: At least three compliant supplier options must be compared above EUR/CHF 100000
action_tuple: WHEN currency = EUR OR currency = CHF
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN currency = EUR OR currency = CHF

action_logs.rule_description: Enforces compatibility review for mobile workstation requests above 50 units in IT category
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l1 = "IT" AND category_l2 = "Mobile Workstations"

action_logs.rule_description: Ensures suppliers are evaluated only if they support data residency requirements for IT/Cloud Compute requests
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l1 = "IT" AND category_l2 = "Cloud Compute"

action_logs.rule_description: Reception and lounge projects require business design sign-off before award
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l2 = "Reception and Lounge Furniture"

action_logs.rule_description: Enforces that named consultant CVs or equivalent capability profiles are required for Software Development Services above 60 consulting days
action_tuple: WHEN category_l1 = "Professional Services" AND category_l2 = "Software Development Services"
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l1 = "Professional Services" AND category_l2 = "Software Development Services"

action_logs.rule_description: Cybersecurity advisory suppliers must demonstrate relevant certifications or equivalent references
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l2 = "Cybersecurity Advisory"

action_logs.rule_description: Enforces brand-safety review for influencer campaigns in the Marketing category
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l2 = "Influencer Campaign Management"
